name: Dynamic Pricing Engine
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for pricing intelligence — demand signal interpretation, competitor price analysis narratives, price elasticity reasoning, fairness constraint evaluation, promotional strategy recommendations

prod.note: ~1.5M tokens/day, gpt-4o for real-time pricing decisions

enterprise.note: Provisioned throughput, sub-second pricing decisions at scale

services.name: Azure Event Hubs
services.purpose: Real-time ingestion of demand signals — transaction streams, inventory level changes, competitor price feeds, web traffic patterns, cart abandonment events, seasonal trend triggers

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Price records, demand curves, competitor snapshots, elasticity models, fairness audit logs, product catalog metadata, pricing rule configurations, A/B test results

prod.note: Dedicated throughput, change feed for price propagation

enterprise.note: Multi-region, analytical store for historical pricing analysis

services.name: Azure Cache for Redis
services.purpose: Sub-millisecond price lookups — current active prices, competitor price cache, demand signal aggregations, rate limiting counters, session-based pricing consistency

enterprise.note: 12GB, active geo-replication, RediSearch for price queries

services.name: Azure Machine Learning
services.purpose: Price elasticity models, demand forecasting, competitor response prediction, optimal price point calculation, cannibalization analysis, promotional lift estimation

prod.note: Managed endpoints, 4 vCPU, hourly model refresh

enterprise.note: GPU compute, deep learning demand models, real-time inference

services.name: Container Apps
services.purpose: Pricing engine API — price calculation service, demand signal aggregator, fairness evaluator, competitor monitor, A/B price testing orchestrator

prod.note: 2 vCPU, 4GB, min 3 replicas for low-latency pricing

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: Competitor API credentials, marketplace integration keys, pricing algorithm encryption keys, customer segment data encryption, audit trail signing keys

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Price decision latency, revenue impact tracking, demand signal freshness, model prediction accuracy, fairness metric compliance, A/B test performance

optimization_tips: Use GPT-4o-mini for routine price recommendations on low-value items — reserve GPT-4o for high-value products requiring complex elasticity reasoning and fairness evaluation, saving 60% on AI costs
Implement Redis caching for competitor price lookups — competitor prices change at most hourly; cache with 30-minute TTL eliminates redundant API calls to scraping services
Use Cosmos DB change feed to propagate price updates reactively — only recalculate affected product prices when demand signals change, rather than batch-recomputing entire catalogs
Right-size Event Hubs throughput units based on actual transaction volume — most retail businesses have predictable daily patterns; scale down TUs during overnight hours with auto-inflate for peaks
Schedule ML model retraining during off-peak hours using spot compute — demand elasticity models need daily retraining but are not latency-sensitive for the training step itself
Set Azure Cost Management budgets with alerts at 50%, 80%, 100%
